blockers.description: Anthropic usage quota exhausted at 2026-04-20T01:00Z; resets at 2026-04-20T01:00Z America/Sao_Paulo (= 2026-04-20T04:00Z UTC — verify local clock). Resume once quota refreshes.

decisions.decision: Run Phase 5 in sequential mode on main tree (no git worktree isolation)
decisions.rationale: Simpler merge semantics during auto-chain; config parallelization=true was only advisory for the single wave with 2 parallel plans (Wave 1); even there running sequential is acceptable and avoids worktree overhead and STATE.md/ROADMAP.md protection complexity.

decisions.decision: Accept the 3 cosmetic warnings from gsd-plan-checker as non-blocking
decisions.rationale: Checker explicitly said 'Plans are executable as-is ... Execution can proceed.' Warnings were: wave-label prose/tag drift across 4 plans (frontmatter correct so orchestrator unaffected), Plan 05-05 has 4 tasks (acceptable per scope_sanity — atomic-migration constraint forces it), CONTEXT.md line 246 prose contradiction (resolved correctly by plans). All documentation-level.

decisions.decision: No back-compat shim for musicality_score.py → musicgen/musicality.py move (Plan 05-03)
decisions.rationale: Matches Plan 03-02 precedent (enhanced_duration_validator.py moved with zero shim). D-03 locks this. Resulted in one `music_gen.py:3` import rewrite only.

decisions.decision: Rule 4 architectural-cascade avoidance: preserved R-P4 JSON schema field key "musicality_score" in 4 locations during 05-03 (distinct from the module name being moved)
decisions.rationale: Changing the JSON key would cascade into Phase 4 R-X6 annotator contract (already shipped), Wave 3/4/5 contracts, and manifest D-13 entry shape. The schema field name is independent of the source module filename.

next_action: Run `/gsd-resume-work` or re-invoke `/gsd-execute-phase 5 --auto --no-transition`. The execute-phase discovery step will see 05-04 has no SUMMARY.md (incomplete) and resume there. First concrete action: spawn gsd-executor for Plan 05-04 with explicit instruction that Tasks 1 + 2 are DONE (committed) and only Task 3 (writer.py + test_writer.py GREEN) remains. Also mention the uncommitted tests/test_writer.py draft — resuming executor should either (a) commit it as RED and proceed to GREEN, or (b) `git restore tests/test_writer.py` and start Task 3 fresh.
context_notes: Phase 5 is the determinism/productize centerpiece: 9 R-P requirements + R-Q3. Plans 05-01/02/03 clean (3 commits + docs each, 634 tests passing after Wave 1). Plan 05-04 is the biggest: 3 tasks (manifest, config, writer); writer.py is the subtlest code in the phase — RESEARCH §Code Examples section has the absolute-tick MIDI concat helper and int32 sum-of-stems helper ready to copy verbatim. The auto-chain flag (workflow._auto_chain_active=true) is still active — on resume, the chain picks up where it left off: finish 05-04, then 05-05, 05-06, then code-review + verify + PHASE COMPLETE → return to parent plan-phase orchestrator with --no-transition semantics (no advance to phase 6).
